title: No Man's Land: Updated Mobs Integration
description: This Resource Pack adds compatibility between the No Man's land Mod and the Updated Mobs Resource Pack
body:
This Resource Pack adds compatibility between No Man's Land  and Updated Mobs, you will need both the No Man's Land and Updated Mobs for this to work, otherwise it will simply break a few models.
This Resource Pack requires EMF and ETF as is required for Updated Mob.

The Resource Pack makes it so Updated Mobs doesn't break the models for No Man's Land.

In order for this Resourcepack to work it needs to be placed as priority in the Resource Pack tab. otherwise it will not work. when you load it however, EMF will show an error, that is not a problem and is in fact intended and causes no issues to the game. 

I don't own any Models (this resourcepack doesn't add any models).

Credits for the Fox, Wolves, Cats, Cod and Salmon Models belong entirely to [Canine Gray](https://modrinth.com/user/CanineGray).

Credits for the Textures which I addapted belong to the [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) team.

Huge Thanks to [Tzr](https://modrinth.com/user/tzr) who helped me figure out how to make this Resource Pack work
